docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY JACKSON, DORETHA AS TO DEFENDANT CORBIN, WALTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED SEP-23-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORBIN, WALTER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, DORETHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORBIN, WALTER $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $190.00, PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE REPLACEMENT DELL COMPUTER WITHIN 30 DAYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CORBIN, WALTER
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY JACKSON, DORETHA CORBIN, WALTER
